mapper.select: SELECT u.UNVEILING_NO, u.UNVEILING_TITLE, u.PRODUCTION_ARTIST, u.PRODUCTION_YEAR, u.PRODUCTION_MATERIAL, u.PRODUCTION_SIZE, u.START_PRICE, u.CURRENT_PRICE, u.FINAL_PRICE, u.BIDDING_COUNT, u.FINISH_DATE, u.PRODUCTION_DETAIL, u.ARTIST_DETAIL, u.UNVEILING_STATUS, u.MEMBER_NO, u.FINALIZED_FL, u.PAYMENT_STATUS, img.UV_IMG_PATH AS THUMB_URL FROM UNVEILING u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT UNVEILING_NO, UV_IMG_PATH FROM ( SELECT ui.UNVEILING_NO, ui.UV_IMG_PATH, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ui.UNVEILING_NO ORDER BY ui.UV_IMG_ORDER ASC) rn FROM UNVEILING_IMG ui ) WHERE rn = 1 ) img ON img.UNVEILING_NO = u.UNVEILING_NO ORDER BY CASE u.UNVEILING_NO WHEN 25 THEN 0 WHEN 29 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, CASE TO_CHAR(u.UNVEILING_STATUS) WHEN 'LIVE' THEN 1 WHEN 'UPCOMING' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, u.UNVEILING_NO DESC

SELECT UNVEILING_NO, UNVEILING_TITLE, PRODUCTION_ARTIST, PRODUCTION_YEAR, PRODUCTION_MATERIAL, PRODUCTION_SIZE, START_PRICE, CURRENT_PRICE, FINAL_PRICE, BIDDING_COUNT, FINISH_DATE, PRODUCTION_DETAIL, ARTIST_DETAIL, UNVEILING_STATUS, MEMBER_NO, FINALIZED_FL, PAYMENT_STATUS, PAYMENT_DUE_DATE, PAID_DATE FROM UNVEILING WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo} FOR UPDATE

SELECT u.UNVEILING_NO, u.UNVEILING_TITLE, u.PRODUCTION_ARTIST, u.PRODUCTION_YEAR, u.PRODUCTION_MATERIAL, u.PRODUCTION_SIZE, u.START_PRICE, u.CURRENT_PRICE, u.FINAL_PRICE, u.BIDDING_COUNT, u.FINISH_DATE, u.PRODUCTION_DETAIL, u.ARTIST_DETAIL, u.UNVEILING_STATUS, u.MEMBER_NO, u.FINALIZED_FL, u.PAYMENT_STATUS, img.UV_IMG_PATH AS THUMB_URL FROM UNVEILING u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT UNVEILING_NO, UV_IMG_PATH FROM ( SELECT ui.UNVEILING_NO, ui.UV_IMG_PATH, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ui.UNVEILING_NO ORDER BY ui.UV_IMG_ORDER ASC) rn FROM UNVEILING_IMG ui ) WHERE rn = 1 ) img ON img.UNVEILING_NO = u.UNVEILING_NO WHERE u.UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo}
SELECT CASE WHEN FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE >= FINISH_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM UNVEILING WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE UNVEILING SET MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}, FINAL_PRICE = #{finalPrice}, FINALIZED_FL = 1, PAYMENT_STATUS = 'PENDING', PAYMENT_DUE_DATE = SYSDATE + 1 WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo}
mapper.select: SELECT UNVEILING_NO, UNVEILING_TITLE, UNVEILING_STATUS, START_PRICE, CURRENT_PRICE, FINAL_PRICE, BIDDING_COUNT, FINISH_DATE, MEMBER_NO, FINALIZED_FL, PAYMENT_STATUS FROM UNVEILING WHERE FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE >= FINISH_DATE AND FINALIZED_FL = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE UNVEILING SET FINALIZED_FL = 1, UNVEILING_STATUS = 'ENDED', PAYMENT_STATUS = 'NO_WINNER' WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo}
UPDATE UNVEILING SET PAYMENT_STATUS = 'PAID', PAID_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo} AND PAYMENT_STATUS = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN PAYMENT_STATUS = 'PENDING' AND PAYMENT_DUE_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE > PAYMENT_DUE_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM UNVEILING WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE UNVEILING SET PAYMENT_STATUS = 'EXPIRED' WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo} AND PAYMENT_STATUS = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT UNVEILING_NO, UNVEILING_TITLE, PRODUCTION_ARTIST, FINISH_DATE, UNVEILING_STATUS, ALERT_SENT_FL FROM UNVEILING WHERE UNVEILING_STATUS = 'LIVE' AND FINISH_DATE IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE < FINISH_DATE AND FINISH_DATE <= SYSDATE + 1/24 AND ALERT_SENT_FL = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE UNVEILING SET ALERT_SENT_FL = 1 WHERE UNVEILING_NO = #{unveilingNo}
